PLTR.name: Palantir Technologies
PLTR.description: The defining Fortune 500 anomaly: a $351B company with only ~$3.7B in revenue — excluded from Fortune 500 due to low revenue vs. massive market cap. U.S. commercial customer count growth: +55% YoY to 321 in Q3 2025, now accelerating quarter-over-quarter
